'''鈭歜-m-w''' ('''kabamaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultrasound|ultrasound]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultrasound|ultrasound]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-m-w
|-
! Lemma
| kabamaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibamaw|thibamaw]] || [[word:jibamaw|jibamaw]] || [[word:shibamaw|shibamaw]] || [[word:kibamaw|kibamaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubamaw|thuthubamaw]] || [[word:jujubamaw|jujubamaw]] || [[word:shushubamaw|shushubamaw]] || [[word:kukubamaw|kukubamaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubamaw|thubamaw]] || [[word:jubamaw|jubamaw]] || [[word:shubamaw|shubamaw]] || [[word:kubamaw|kubamaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubamaw|thubamaw]] || [[word:jubamaw|jubamaw]] || [[word:shubamaw|shubamaw]] || [[word:kubamaw|kubamaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebamaw|thebamaw]] || [[word:jebamaw|jebamaw]] || [[word:shebamaw|shebamaw]] || [[word:kebamaw|kebamaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobamaw|thothobamaw]] || [[word:jojobamaw|jojobamaw]] || [[word:shoshobamaw|shoshobamaw]] || [[word:kokobamaw|kokobamaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobamaw|thobamaw]] || [[word:jobamaw|jobamaw]] || [[word:shobamaw|shobamaw]] || [[word:kobamaw|kobamaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobamaw|thobamaw]] || [[word:jobamaw|jobamaw]] || [[word:shobamaw|shobamaw]] || [[word:kobamaw|kobamaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bamaw|th忙bamaw]] || [[word:j忙bamaw|j忙bamaw]] || [[word:sh忙bamaw|sh忙bamaw]] || [[word:k忙bamaw|k忙bamaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabamaw|thathabamaw]] || [[word:jajabamaw|jajabamaw]] || [[word:shashabamaw|shashabamaw]] || [[word:kakabamaw|kakabamaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabamaw|thabamaw]] || [[word:jabamaw|jabamaw]] || [[word:shabamaw|shabamaw]] || [[word:kabamaw|kabamaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabamaw|thabamaw]] || [[word:jabamaw|jabamaw]] || [[word:shabamaw|shabamaw]] || [[word:kabamaw|kabamaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabamaw|shabamaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabamaw|goshabamaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabamaw|gokishabamaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabamawn眉|shabamawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabamawnkn眉|goshabamawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabamawn眉|gokishabamawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabamawsh毛|shabamawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabamawnksh毛|goshabamawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabamawsh毛|gokishabamawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabamawro|shabamawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabamawnkro|goshabamawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabamawro|gokishabamawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabamawmu|shabamawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabamawnkmu|goshabamawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabamawmu|gokishabamawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabamawsher|shabamawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabamawnksher|goshabamawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabamawsher|gokishabamawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabamawng|shabamawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabamawnkng|goshabamawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabamawng|gokishabamawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabamawya|shabamawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabamawnkya|goshabamawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabamawya|gokishabamawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabamawyam|shabamawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabamawnkyam|goshabamawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabamawyam|gokishabamawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabamawn眉sh毛|shabamawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabamawnkn眉sh毛|goshabamawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabamawn眉sh毛|gokishabamawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabamawn眉ro|shabamawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabamawnkn眉ro|goshabamawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabamawn眉ro|gokishabamawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabamawn眉mu|shabamawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabamawnkn眉mu|goshabamawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabamawn眉mu|gokishabamawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabamawsh毛n眉|shabamawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabamawnksh毛n眉|goshabamawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabamawsh毛n眉|gokishabamawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabamawsh毛ro|shabamawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabamawnksh毛ro|goshabamawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabamawsh毛ro|gokishabamawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabamawsh毛mu|shabamawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabamawnksh毛mu|goshabamawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabamawsh毛mu|gokishabamawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabamawron眉|shabamawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabamawnkron眉|goshabamawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabamawron眉|gokishabamawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabamawrosh毛|shabamawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabamawnkrosh毛|goshabamawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabamawrosh毛|gokishabamawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabamawromu|shabamawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabamawnkromu|goshabamawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabamawromu|gokishabamawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabamawmun眉|shabamawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabamawnkmun眉|goshabamawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabamawmun眉|gokishabamawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabamawmush毛|shabamawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabamawnkmush毛|goshabamawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabamawmush毛|gokishabamawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabamawmuro|shabamawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabamawnkmuro|goshabamawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabamawmuro|gokishabamawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
